task_description: Build the next 7 features for LeadGenius: WebSockets + real-time notifications, spam content checker + email preview, contact enrichment integration, public REST API + OpenAPI docs, LinkedIn automation channel, team collaboration, and production infrastructure.

verification.summary: All 1227 API tests and 104 web tests pass after review fixes. packages/shared and apps/web build cleanly. apps/api has only pre-existing tsc errors in smtp-server.test.ts and simulation.test.ts (unrelated to new features). apps/workers has pre-existing build issues (rootDir configuration). All 7 features implemented with comprehensive tests.

critical_fixed: API key auth can now access protected routes via synthetic req.user in requireAuth
Assignment rule PUT/DELETE verifies workspace ownership (returns 404 for cross-workspace)
WebSocket server closed during graceful shutdown (via getWss() + wss.close())
Notification preferences consulted during delivery (none=skip, email=skip WS, in_app=skip email)
non_critical_acknowledged: In-memory rate limiter (by design for MVP, Redis-backed can be added later)
JWT in WebSocket URL (common pattern, can be improved with upgrade tickets later)
Rate limiter only for API key traffic (by design - JWT users have session-based limits)
